item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the requested additional local human checkpoint, recognizes the repeated pattern of downstream manual gates across the four incidents, moves the diagnosis upstream to unstable ownership/verification of identity, status, warehouse, and batch data, and proposes consolidation through same-source failure grouping plus unified pre-flow verification responsibility/evidence. It does not provide the requested sorting-table confirmer or another manual check."}
